title: Device Settings - Settings screen for disconnected device
scenario: Settings screen for a disconnected device displays appropriate tabs (Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, Delete Device) when accessed via the "..." button.
steps: Start the app with a disconnected headset.
Navigate to Device Settings by tapping the '...' button.
Observe the tabs displayed in the settings section.
expected: The settings section should display tabs such as Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, and Delete Device. (Tabs may slightly differ between devices.)
